# Name: # Two NVS partitions to isolate Matter credentials from general app state:
#   nvs        — general app state; safe to auto-erase on corruption.
#   nvs_matter — factory data (discriminator
#                and fabric operational credentials. Never auto-erased; requires
#                deliberate factory reset. ACL entries and subscription state are
#                stored in nvs (see CONFIG_CHIP_CONFIG_NAMESPACE_PARTITION_LABEL).
# Combined NVS size unchanged (48 KB). phy_init offset unchanged at 0x15000.
# OTA intentionally unsupported: no ota_0/ota_1/otadata partitions in this table.
#   This is a factory-only (non-updateable) prototype build. The Matter OTA
#   Software Update Requestor cluster is disabled via CONFIG_ENABLE_OTA_REQUESTOR=n
#   in sdkconfig.defaults to avoid advertising a capability that cannot be fulfilled.
#   To add OTA: carve ota_0/ota_1 from the factory partition
#   and remove the disabling config.
# nvs_keys: one sector (4 KB) reserved for NVS encryption key storage.
#   Required layout: type=data
#   The NVS driver ignores this partition until CONFIG_NVS_ENCRYPTION=y is set;
#   reserving it now avoids a partition-table incompatibility if flash encryption
#   (CONFIG_FLASH_ENCRYPTION_ENABLED) is enabled later for production builds.
#   factory and coredump offsets are unchanged.
nvs
nvs_matter
phy_init
nvs_keys
factory
coredump
